paragraphs.text: Payment liquidators such as Mastercard or Paypal should have no power or a right to determine what the payment holder buys. This is because these payment liquidators intend to press and censor their ideologies on gaming platforms such as Steam od. Itch.io, but it should not be in their right to determine what a person buys with their own money (apart from illegal content of course, but payment liquidators only censor legal content here). Unfortunately, there are no real alternatives here either, as they are all American, which ensures that forced displacement platforms have no choice but to meet the requirements and remove certain video games from search. This should simply not be and is not acceptable for American companies to influence what we are allowed to consume and what is not.
